script.arcTitle: Canada v Morocco: The Atlas Lions Pull Away
script.openingLine: A place in the quarter-finals is at stake as Canada meet Morocco in Houston.

moments.spokenLine: Canada meet Morocco in the round of 16 at Houston Stadium.
moments.explainer: The knockout journey begins with both sides level and everything still to play for.

moments.spokenLine: Redouane HALHAL is shown a card for Morocco.
moments.explainer: The first booking adds an early edge to a still-goalless contest.

moments.spokenLine: Richie LARYEA is shown a card for Canada.
moments.explainer: Canada receive their first booking as the match remains level.

moments.spokenLine: Achraf HAKIMI is shown a card for Morocco.
moments.explainer: Morocco are also cautioned, keeping the contest finely balanced.

moments.spokenLine: Jonathan DAVID is shown a card for Canada.
moments.explainer: Canada collect another booking before the interval, with no score to separate them.

moments.spokenLine: Azzedine OUNAHI is shown a card for Morocco.
moments.explainer: Morocco’s caution count rises as the tense first half draws on.
Neither side has broken through, so the round-of-16 tie remains completely open.

moments.spokenLine: Luc DE FOUGEROLLES is shown a card for Canada.
moments.explainer: Canada begin the second half with another booking, still searching for a breakthrough.

moments.spokenLine: Azzedine OUNAHI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–1.
moments.explainer: Morocco now lead, transforming a goalless tie into a chase for Canada.

moments.spokenLine: Bilal EL KHANNOUSS is shown a card for Morocco.
moments.explainer: Morocco lead 0–1, but the physical contest continues with another booking.

moments.spokenLine: Cyle LARIN is shown a card for Canada.
moments.explainer: Canada are cautioned again while still trailing 0–1.

moments.spokenLine: Azzedine OUNAHI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–2.
moments.explainer: Morocco double their lead, leaving Canada with a much steeper climb.

moments.spokenLine: Soufiane RAHIMI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–3.
moments.explainer: Morocco add a third, turning their advantage into a decisive victory.
Morocco complete a three-goal round-of-16 win over Canada.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Canada meet Morocco in the round of 16 at Houston Stadium.
In the 20th minute, Redouane HALHAL is shown a card for Morocco.
In the 40th minute, Richie LARYEA is shown a card for Canada.
In the 40th minute, Achraf HAKIMI is shown a card for Morocco.
In the 43rd minute, Jonathan DAVID is shown a card for Canada.
In the 45th minute, Azzedine OUNAHI is shown a card for Morocco.
In the 49th minute, Luc DE FOUGEROLLES is shown a card for Canada.
In the 50th minute, Azzedine OUNAHI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–1.
In the 6th minute of first-half stoppage time, Bilal EL KHANNOUSS is shown a card for Morocco.
In the 67th minute, Cyle LARIN is shown a card for Canada.
In the 82nd minute, Azzedine OUNAHI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–2.
In the 8th minute of second-half stoppage time, Soufiane RAHIMI scores for Morocco. The verified score moves to 0–3.
